            function updateMobileFilterSelections() {
                mobileFilterSelections.developers = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.mobile-filter-checkbox-item[data-filter-type="developer"].checked'))
                    .map(el => el.dataset.value);
                mobileFilterSelections.environments = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.mobile-filter-checkbox-item[data-filter-type="environment"].checked'))
                    .map(el => el.dataset.value);
                mobileFilterSelections.tags = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.mobile-filter-checkbox-item[data-filter-type="tag"].checked'))
                    .map(el => el.dataset.value);
                mobileFilterSelections.search = document.getElementById('mobileFilterSearch')?.value || '';
                mobileFilterSelections.lastEdited = document.querySelector('#mobileFilterLastEdited .mobile-filter-custom-select-option.selected')?.dataset.value || '';
            }

            function applyMobileFilters() {
                const mobileComponentsTab = document.getElementById('mobileComponentsTab');
                const isComponentsTab = mobileComponentsTab && mobileComponentsTab.classList.contains('active');
                const gridId = isComponentsTab ? 'mobileComponentsGrid' : 'mobileExperiencesGrid';
                const grid = document.getElementById(gridId);
                if (!grid) return;

                const searchValue = document.getElementById('mobileFilterSearch')?.value.toLowerCase().trim() || '';
                const lastEdited = document.querySelector('#mobileFilterLastEdited .mobile-filter-custom-select-option.selected')?.dataset.value || '';

                const selectedDevelopers = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.mobile-filter-checkbox-item[data-filter-type="developer"].checked'))
                    .map(el => el.dataset.value);
                const selectedEnvironments = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.mobile-filter-checkbox-item[data-filter-type="environment"].checked'))
                    .map(el => el.dataset.value);
                const selectedTags = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.mobile-filter-checkbox-item[data-filter-type="tag"].checked'))
                    .map(el => el.dataset.value);

                // Helper function to get days ago from lastEdited string
                function getDaysAgo(lastEditedStr) {
                    if (!lastEditedStr) return -1;
                    const lower = lastEditedStr.toLowerCase().trim();
                    if (lower === 'today' || lower === 'just now' || lower.includes('hour') || lower.includes('minute') || lower.includes('second')) return 0;
                    if (lower === 'yesterday' || lower === '1d' || lower === '1d ago') return 1;
                    let match = lower.match(/(\d+)\s*d(?:ay)?s?\s*ago/i);
                    if (match) return parseInt(match[1], 10);
                    match = lower.match(/^(\d+)d$/i);
                    if (match) return parseInt(match[1], 10);
                    match = lower.match(/(\d+)\s*w(?:eek)?s?\s*ago/i);
                    if (match) return parseInt(match[1], 10) * 7;
                    match = lower.match(/^(\d+)w$/i);
                    if (match) return parseInt(match[1], 10) * 7;
                    match = lower.match(/(\d+)\s*mo(?:nth)?s?\s*ago/i);
                    if (match) return parseInt(match[1], 10) * 30;
                    match = lower.match(/^(\d+)m$/i);
                    if (match) return parseInt(match[1], 10) * 30;
                    match = lower.match(/(\d+)\s*y(?:ear)?s?\s*ago/i);
                    if (match) return parseInt(match[1], 10) * 365;
                    match = lower.match(/^(\d+)y$/i);
                    if (match) return parseInt(match[1], 10) * 365;
                    const months = ['jan', 'feb', 'mar', 'apr', 'may', 'jun', 'jul', 'aug', 'sep', 'oct', 'nov', 'dec'];
                    for (let i = 0; i < months.length; i++) {
                        if (lower.startsWith(months[i])) {
                            const dayMatch = lower.match(/(\d+)/);
                            if (dayMatch) {
                                const day = parseInt(dayMatch[1], 10);
                                const now = new Date();
                                let year = now.getFullYear();
                                let itemDate = new Date(year, i, day);
                                if (itemDate > now) {
                                    itemDate = new Date(year - 1, i, day);
                                }
                                const diffTime = now.getTime() - itemDate.getTime();
                                return Math.floor(diffTime / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
                            }
                        }
                    }
                    return -1;
                }

                const cards = grid.querySelectorAll('.mobile-component-card');
                cards.forEach(card => {
                    // Read filter data from state instead of DOM to support preview mode
                    const cardId = card.dataset.id;
                    const dataSource = isComponentsTab ? state.components : state.experiences;
                    const item = dataSource.find(c => String(c.id) === String(cardId));

                    if (!item) {
                        card.style.display = 'none';
                        return;
                    }

                    const title = item.name?.toLowerCase() || '';
                    const author = item.author?.toLowerCase() || '';
                    const cardEnvs = (item.environments || []).map(e => e.toLowerCase());
                    const cardTags = (item.tags || []).map(t => getTagText(t).toLowerCase());
                    const cardDate = item.lastEdited || '';

                    let show = true;

                    // Search filter
                    if (searchValue && !title.includes(searchValue) && !author.includes(searchValue)) {
                        show = false;
                    }

                    // Last Edited filter
                    if (lastEdited && show) {
                        const daysAgo = getDaysAgo(cardDate);
                        if (daysAgo >= 0) {
                            switch (lastEdited) {
                                case 'today':
                                    if (daysAgo > 0) show = false;
                                    break;
                                case 'week':
                                    if (daysAgo > 7) show = false;
                                    break;
                                case 'month':
                                    if (daysAgo > 30) show = false;
                                    break;
                                case 'year':
                                    if (daysAgo > 365) show = false;
                                    break;
                            }
                        }
                    }

                    // Developer filter
                    if (selectedDevelopers.length > 0 && !selectedDevelopers.some(dev => author.includes(dev.toLowerCase()))) {
                        show = false;
                    }

                    // Environment filter
                    if (selectedEnvironments.length > 0 && !selectedEnvironments.some(env => cardEnvs.includes(env.toLowerCase()))) {
                        show = false;
                    }

                    // Tags filter
                    if (selectedTags.length > 0 && !selectedTags.some(tag => cardTags.includes(tag.toLowerCase()))) {
                        show = false;
                    }

                    card.style.display = show ? '' : 'none';
                });

                // Update mobile filter count badge
                const visibleCount = Array.from(cards).filter(c => c.style.display !== 'none').length;
                const totalCount = cards.length;
                const mobileCountBadge = document.getElementById('mobileFilterCount');
                const label = isComponentsTab ? 'components' : 'experiences';
                if (mobileCountBadge) {
                    mobileCountBadge.innerHTML = `Showing <span class="count-bold">${visibleCount}</span> of ${totalCount} ${label}`;
                }
            }

            function clearMobileFilters() {
                const searchInput = document.getElementById('mobileFilterSearch');
                const lastEditedSelect = document.getElementById('mobileFilterLastEdited');
                if (searchInput) searchInput.value = '';

                // Reset custom select
                if (lastEditedSelect) {
                    const options = lastEditedSelect.querySelectorAll('.mobile-filter-custom-select-option');
                    const valueDisplay = lastEditedSelect.querySelector('.mobile-filter-custom-select-value');
                    options.forEach(opt => opt.classList.remove('selected'));
                    const defaultOption = lastEditedSelect.querySelector('.mobile-filter-custom-select-option[data-value=""]');
                    if (defaultOption) defaultOption.classList.add('selected');
                    if (valueDisplay) valueDisplay.textContent = 'Any time';
                }

                document.querySelectorAll('.mobile-filter-checkbox-item.checked').forEach(item => {
                    item.classList.remove('checked');
                });

                // Clear stored selections
                mobileFilterSelections.developers = [];
                mobileFilterSelections.environments = [];
                mobileFilterSelections.tags = [];
                mobileFilterSelections.search = '';
                mobileFilterSelections.lastEdited = '';

                applyMobileFilters();
            }

            if (mobileFilterBtn) {
                mobileFilterBtn.addEventListener('click', openMobileFilterPanel);
            }

            if (mobileFilterClose) {
                mobileFilterClose.addEventListener('click', closeMobileFilterPanel);
            }

            if (mobileFilterOverlay) {
                mobileFilterOverlay.addEventListener('click', closeMobileFilterPanel);
            }

            if (mobileFilterClear) {
                mobileFilterClear.addEventListener('click', clearMobileFilters);
            }

            // Apply filters on search input
            const mobileFilterSearchInput = document.getElementById('mobileFilterSearch');
            if (mobileFilterSearchInput) {
                mobileFilterSearchInput.addEventListener('input', () => {
                    mobileFilterSelections.search = mobileFilterSearchInput.value;
                    applyMobileFilters();
                });
            }

            // Mobile custom select for Last Edited
            const mobileFilterLastEdited = document.getElementById('mobileFilterLastEdited');
            if (mobileFilterLastEdited) {
                const trigger = mobileFilterLastEdited.querySelector('.mobile-filter-custom-select-trigger');
                const options = mobileFilterLastEdited.querySelectorAll('.mobile-filter-custom-select-option');
                const valueDisplay = mobileFilterLastEdited.querySelector('.mobile-filter-custom-select-value');

                // Toggle dropdown
                trigger.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                    e.stopPropagation();
                    mobileFilterLastEdited.classList.toggle('open');
                });

                // Select option
                options.forEach(option => {
                    option.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                        e.stopPropagation();
                        // Update selected state
                        options.forEach(opt => opt.classList.remove('selected'));
                        option.classList.add('selected');
                        // Update display value
                        valueDisplay.textContent = option.textContent;
                        // Close dropdown
                        mobileFilterLastEdited.classList.remove('open');
                        // Update filter
                        mobileFilterSelections.lastEdited = option.dataset.value;
                        applyMobileFilters();

            // Populate desktop filter dropdown with data
            function populateDesktopFilterDropdown(type) {
                const prefix = type === 'components' ? 'desktopComponents' : 'desktopExperiences';
                const items = type === 'components' ? state.components : state.experiences;

                // Collect unique values
                const developers = new Set();
                const environments = new Set();
                const tags = new Set();

                items.forEach(item => {
                    if (item.author) developers.add(item.author);
                    (item.environments || []).forEach(env => environments.add(env));
                    (item.tags || []).forEach(tag => {
                        const tagText = getTagText(tag);
                        if (tagText) {

                if (environmentsContainer && environmentsContainer.children.length === 0) {

                // Populate tags

            // Create checkbox item for desktop filter
            function createDesktopCheckboxItem(filterType, value, sectionType) {
                const item = document.createElement('div');
                item.className = 'desktop-filter-checkbox-item';

                item.dataset.value = value;
                item.innerHTML = `
                    <div class="desktop-filter-checkbox">

                            <path d="M2.5 6L5 8.5L9.5 3.5" stroke="white" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path>
                        </svg>
                    </div>

                `;
                item.addEventListener('click', () => {

            }

            // Apply desktop filters
            function applyDesktopFilters(type) {
                const prefix = type === 'components' ? 'desktopComponents' : 'desktopExperiences';
                const gridId = type === 'components' ? 'componentsGrid' : 'experiencesGrid';
                const cardClass = type === 'components' ? '.component-card' : '.experience-card';

                const searchInput = document.getElementById(`${prefix}FilterSearch`);
                const lastEditedCustomSelect = document.getElementById(`${prefix}FilterLastEdited`);
                const dropdown = document.getElementById(`${type}FilterDropdown`);

                const searchQuery = searchInput?.value.toLowerCase() || '';
                const lastEdited = lastEditedCustomSelect?.dataset.selectedValue || '';

                // Get checked filters
                const checkedDevelopers = dropdown ? Array.from(dropdown.querySelectorAll('.desktop-filter-checkbox-item[data-filter-type="developer"].checked')).map(el => el.dataset.value) : [];
                const checkedEnvironments = dropdown ? Array.from(dropdown.querySelectorAll('.desktop-filter-checkbox-item[data-filter-type="environment"].checked')).map(el => el.dataset.value) : [];
                const checkedTags = dropdown ? Array.from(dropdown.querySelectorAll('.desktop-filter-checkbox-item[data-filter-type="tag"].checked')).map(el => el.dataset.value) : [];

                const grid = document.getElementById(gridId);
                if (!grid) return;
                const cards = grid.querySelectorAll(cardClass);

                const items = type === 'components' ? state.components : state.experiences;

                cards.forEach(card => {
                    const componentId = card.dataset.id;
                    const item = items.find(c => String(c.id) === componentId);
                    if (!item) {
                        card.style.display = '';
                        return;
                    }

                    let visible = true;

                    // Search filter
                    if (searchQuery) {
                        const name = (item.name || '').toLowerCase();
                        const author = (item.author || '').toLowerCase();
                        if (!name.includes(searchQuery) && !author.includes(searchQuery)) {
                            visible = false;
                        }
                    }

                    // Developer filter
                    if (visible && checkedDevelopers.length > 0) {
                        if (!checkedDevelopers.includes(item.author)) {
                            visible = false;
                        }
                    }

                    // Environment filter
                    if (visible && checkedEnvironments.length > 0) {
                        const itemEnvs = item.environments || [];
                        if (!checkedEnvironments.some(env => itemEnvs.includes(env))) {
                            visible = false;
                        }
                    }

                    // Tag filter
                    if (visible && checkedTags.length > 0) {
                        const itemTags = (item.tags || []).map(t => getTagText(t).replace('#', '').toLowerCase()).filter(Boolean);
                        const normalizedCheckedTags = checkedTags.map(t => t.toLowerCase());
                        if (!normalizedCheckedTags.some(tag => itemTags.includes(tag))) {
                            visible = false;
                        }
                    }

                    // Last Edited filter
                    if (visible && lastEdited) {
                        try {
                            const dateText = item.lastEdited || '';

                            // Parse relative time to days ago (0 = today, 1 = yesterday, etc.)
                            const getDaysAgo = (text) => {
                                if (!text) return -1;
                                const lower = text.toLowerCase().trim();

                                // Today patterns
                                if (lower === 'today' || lower.includes('hour') || lower.includes('minute') || lower === 'just now' || lower.includes('sec') || lower.match(/^\d+[hms]$/)) {
                                    return 0;
                                }
                                if (lower === 'yesterday' || lower === '1d' || lower === '1d ago') {
                                    return 1;
                                }
                                // Match "3 days ago", "2 weeks ago", "1 month ago", "6 months ago"
                                const match = lower.match(/(\d+)\s*(d|day|w|week|m|month|y|year)s?\s*(ago)?/);
                                if (match) {
                                    const num = parseInt(match[1]);
                                    const unit = match[2];
                                    if (unit === 'd' || unit === 'day') return num;
                                    if (unit === 'w' || unit === 'week') return num * 7;
                                    if (unit === 'm' || unit === 'month') return num * 30;
                                    if (unit === 'y' || unit === 'year') return num * 365;
                                }
                                // Date format like "Apr 15", "Jan 20" - calculate days ago
                                const monthMatch = lower.match(/(jan|feb|mar|apr|may|jun|jul|aug|sep|oct|nov|dec)\s*(\d{1,2})/);
                                if (monthMatch) {
                                    const months = ['jan','feb','mar','apr','may','jun','jul','aug','sep','oct','nov','dec'];
                                    const monthIdx = months.indexOf(monthMatch[1]);
                                    const day = parseInt(monthMatch[2]);
                                    const now = new Date();
                                    const itemDate = new Date(now.getFullYear(), monthIdx, day);
                                    if (itemDate > now) itemDate.setFullYear(now.getFullYear() - 1);
                                    return Math.floor((now - itemDate) / 86400000);
                                }
                                return -1;
                            };

                            const daysAgo = getDaysAgo(dateText);

                            if (daysAgo >= 0) {
                                switch (lastEdited) {
                                    case 'today':
                                        if (daysAgo > 0) visible = false;
                                        break;
                                    case 'week':
                                        if (daysAgo > 7) visible = false;
                                        break;
                                    case 'month':
                                        if (daysAgo > 30) visible = false;
                                        break;
                                    case 'year':
                                        if (daysAgo > 365) visible = false;
                                        break;
                                }
                            }
                        } catch (e) {
                            // On error, keep item visible
                        }
                    }

                    card.style.display = visible ? '' : 'none';
                });

                // Update filter count badge
                const visibleCount = Array.from(cards).filter(c => c.style.display !== 'none').length;
                const totalCount = cards.length;
                const countBadge = document.getElementById(`${type}FilterCount`);
                const label = type === 'components' ? 'components' : 'experiences';

                if (countBadge) {
                    countBadge.innerHTML = `Showing <span class="count-bold">${visibleCount}</span> of ${totalCount} ${label}`;
                }
            }

            // Add input listeners for desktop filters
            ['desktopComponentsFilterSearch', 'desktopExperiencesFilterSearch'].forEach(id => {
                const input = document.getElementById(id);
                if (input) {
                    input.addEventListener('input', () => {
                        const type = id.includes('Components') ? 'components' : 'experiences';
                        applyDesktopFilters(type);

            // Custom select dropdowns
            document.querySelectorAll('.desktop-filter-custom-select').forEach(customSelect => {
                const trigger = customSelect.querySelector('.desktop-filter-custom-select-trigger');

            });

            // Close custom selects on outside click
            document.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                document.querySelectorAll('.desktop-filter-custom-select.open').forEach(select => {

            // Close desktop filter dropdowns on outside click

            // Close dropdowns on outside click

        function sortComponents(sortType) {
            const grid = document.getElementById('componentsGrid');
            const cards = Array.from(grid.querySelectorAll('.component-card'));

            // Remove all component cards
            cards.forEach(card => card.remove());

            // Sort based on sortType
            if (sortType === 'name') {
                // Sort by component name alphabetically
                cards.sort((a, b) => {
                    const nameA = a.querySelector('.card-title')?.textContent.toLowerCase() || '';
                    const nameB = b.querySelector('.card-title')?.textContent.toLowerCase() || '';
                    return nameA.localeCompare(nameB);
                });
            } else if (sortType === 'lastEdited') {
                // Sort by last edited date (newest first)
                // Parse relative time strings like "1d ago", "2h ago", "30m ago" into minutes
                const parseRelativeTime = (text) => {
                    if (!text) return Infinity;
                    // Extract the relative time part (e.g., "1d ago" from "Last edited: 1d ago")
                    const match = text.match(/(\d+)\s*(m|h|d|w|mo|y)\s*ago/i);
                    if (!match) return Infinity;
                    const value = parseInt(match[1], 10);
                    const unit = match[2].toLowerCase();
                    // Convert to minutes for comparison (smaller = more recent)
                    switch (unit) {
                        case 'm': return value;
                        case 'h': return value * 60;
                        case 'd': return value * 60 * 24;
                        case 'w': return value * 60 * 24 * 7;
                        case 'mo': return value * 60 * 24 * 30;
                        case 'y': return value * 60 * 24 * 365;
                        default: return Infinity;
                    }
                };
                cards.sort((a, b) => {
                    const dateTextA = a.querySelector('.card-date')?.textContent || '';
                    const dateTextB = b.querySelector('.card-date')?.textContent || '';
                    const timeA = parseRelativeTime(dateTextA);
                    const timeB = parseRelativeTime(dateTextB);
                    return timeA - timeB; // Smaller time ago = more recent = comes first
                });
            } else if (sortType === 'dateCreated') {
                // Sort by date created (newest first)
                cards.sort((a, b) => {
                    const componentA = state.components.find(c => c.id === a.dataset.id);
                    const componentB = state.components.find(c => c.id === b.dataset.id);
                    const dateA = componentA?.dateCreated || '';
                    const dateB = componentB?.dateCreated || '';
                    return new Date(dateB) - new Date(dateA);
                });
            } else if (sortType && sortType.startsWith('tag-')) {
                // Filter by tag - show matching cards first
                const tag = sortType.replace('tag-', '');
                cards.sort((a, b) => {
                    // Get tags from state data using card's data-id
                    const componentA = state.components.find(c => c.id === a.dataset.id);
                    const componentB = state.components.find(c => c.id === b.dataset.id);
                    const tagsA = (componentA?.tags || []).map(getTagText).filter(Boolean);
                    const tagsB = (componentB?.tags || []).map(getTagText).filter(Boolean);
                    const hasTagA = tagsA.includes(tag) ? 0 : 1;
                    const hasTagB = tagsB.includes(tag) ? 0 : 1;
                    return hasTagA - hasTagB;
                });
            }

            // Re-append sorted cards after spacer
            cards.forEach(card => grid.appendChild(card));
        }

        function sortExperiences(sortType) {
            const grid = document.getElementById('experiencesGrid');
            const cards = Array.from(grid.querySelectorAll('.experience-card'));

            // Remove all experience cards
            cards.forEach(card => card.remove());

            // Sort based on sortType
            if (sortType === 'name') {
                // Sort by experience name alphabetically
                cards.sort((a, b) => {
                    const nameA = a.querySelector('.card-title')?.textContent.toLowerCase() || '';
                    const nameB = b.querySelector('.card-title')?.textContent.toLowerCase() || '';
                    return nameA.localeCompare(nameB);
                });
            } else if (sortType === 'lastEdited') {
                // Sort by last edited date (newest first)
                // Parse relative time strings like "1d ago", "2h ago", "30m ago" into minutes
                const parseRelativeTime = (text) => {
                    if (!text) return Infinity;
                    // Extract the relative time part (e.g., "1d ago" from "Last edited: 1d ago")
                    const match = text.match(/(\d+)\s*(m|h|d|w|mo|y)\s*ago/i);
                    if (!match) return Infinity;
                    const value = parseInt(match[1], 10);
                    const unit = match[2].toLowerCase();
                    // Convert to minutes for comparison (smaller = more recent)
                    switch (unit) {
                        case 'm': return value;
                        case 'h': return value * 60;
                        case 'd': return value * 60 * 24;
                        case 'w': return value * 60 * 24 * 7;
                        case 'mo': return value * 60 * 24 * 30;
                        case 'y': return value * 60 * 24 * 365;
                        default: return Infinity;
                    }
                };
                cards.sort((a, b) => {
                    const dateTextA = a.querySelector('.card-date')?.textContent || '';
                    const dateTextB = b.querySelector('.card-date')?.textContent || '';
                    const timeA = parseRelativeTime(dateTextA);
                    const timeB = parseRelativeTime(dateTextB);
                    return timeA - timeB; // Smaller time ago = more recent = comes first
                });
            } else if (sortType === 'dateCreated') {
                // Sort by date created (newest first)
                cards.sort((a, b) => {
                    const expA = state.experiences.find(e => e.id === a.dataset.id);
                    const expB = state.experiences.find(e => e.id === b.dataset.id);
                    const dateA = expA?.dateCreated || '';
                    const dateB = expB?.dateCreated || '';
                    return new Date(dateB) - new Date(dateA);
                });
            } else if (sortType && sortType.startsWith('tag-')) {
                // Filter by tag - show matching cards first
                const tag = sortType.replace('tag-', '');
                cards.sort((a, b) => {
                    // Get tags from state data using card's data-id
                    const expA = state.experiences.find(e => e.id === a.dataset.id);
                    const expB = state.experiences.find(e => e.id === b.dataset.id);
                    const tagsA = (expA?.tags || []).map(getTagText).filter(Boolean);
                    const tagsB = (expB?.tags || []).map(getTagText).filter(Boolean);
                    const hasTagA = tagsA.includes(tag) ? 0 : 1;
                    const hasTagB = tagsB.includes(tag) ? 0 : 1;
                    return hasTagA - hasTagB;
                });
            }

            // Re-append sorted cards after spacer
            cards.forEach(card => grid.appendChild(card));
        }

        function initResize() {
            const handle = document.getElementById('resizeHandle');
            const componentsSection = document.getElementById('componentsSection');
            const experiencesSection = document.getElementById('experiencesSection');
            const contentArea = document.querySelector('.content-area');

            if (!handle || !componentsSection || !experiencesSection || !contentArea) return;

            // Ensure handle always has the resize cursor
            handle.style.cursor = 'ew-resize';

            // Re-apply cursor on hover to ensure it shows
            handle.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
                handle.style.cursor = 'ew-resize';
            });

            let isResizing = false;

            handle.addEventListener('mousedown', () => {
                isResizing = true;
                document.body.style.cursor = 'col-resize';
                document.body.style.userSelect = 'none';
            });

            document.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
                if (!isResizing) return;
                const containerRect = contentArea.getBoundingClientRect();
                const percentage = ((e.clientX - containerRect.left) / containerRect.width) * 100;
                if (percentage > 20 && percentage < 80) {
                    componentsSection.style.flex = `0 0 ${percentage}%`;
                    experiencesSection.style.flex = `0 0 ${100 - percentage - 1}%`;
                }
            });

            document.addEventListener('mouseup', () => {
                isResizing = false;
                document.body.style.cursor = '';
                document.body.style.userSelect = '';
                // Re-ensure handle keeps its cursor after body reset
                handle.style.cursor = 'ew-resize';
            });
        }

        function initTooltips() {
            const tooltip = document.getElementById('universalTooltip');
            if (!tooltip) return;

            let hideTimer = null;
            let showTimer = null;

            function showTooltip(target, text) {
                clearTimeout(hideTimer);
                clearTimeout(showTimer);
                showTimer = setTimeout(() => {
                    tooltip.textContent = text;
                    const rect = target.getBoundingClientRect();

                    // Try positioning above the element first
                    const tooltipHeight = tooltip.offsetHeight;
                    const topPosition = rect.top - tooltipHeight - 8;

                    // If not enough room above (less than 0), position to the right instead
                    if (topPosition < 0) {
                        // Position to the right
                        tooltip.style.left = (rect.right + 12) + 'px';
                        tooltip.style.top = (rect.top + rect.height / 2 - tooltipHeight / 2) + 'px';
                    } else {
                        // Position above (centered horizontally on the element)
                        tooltip.style.left = (rect.left + rect.width / 2 - tooltip.offsetWidth / 2) + 'px';
                        tooltip.style.top = topPosition + 'px';
                    }

                    tooltip.classList.add('visible');
                    hideTimer = setTimeout(() => tooltip.classList.remove('visible'), 4000);
                }, 500);
            }

            function hideTooltip() {
                clearTimeout(hideTimer);
                clearTimeout(showTimer);
                tooltip.classList.remove('visible');
            }

            document.addEventListener('mouseenter', function (e) {
                if (!e.target || !e.target.closest) return;
                const target = e.target.closest('[data-tooltip]');
                if (!target) return;
                if (target.classList.contains('card-title') || target.classList.contains('card-preview-title') || target.scrollWidth > target.clientWidth) {
                    showTooltip(target, target.getAttribute('data-tooltip'));
                }
            }, true);

            document.addEventListener('mouseleave', function (e) {
                if (!e.target || !e.target.closest) return;
                const target = e.target.closest('[data-tooltip]');
                if (target) hideTooltip();
            }, true);

            document.querySelectorAll('.filter-dropdown-btn').forEach(btn => {
                btn.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => showTooltip(btn, 'Sort by'));
                btn.addEventListener('mouseleave', hideTooltip);
                btn.addEventListener('click', hideTooltip);
            });

            // Filter button tooltips (desktop)
            const filterBtn2 = document.getElementById('componentsFilterBtn2');
            if (filterBtn2) {
                filterBtn2.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => showTooltip(filterBtn2, 'Filter by'));
                filterBtn2.addEventListener('mouseleave', hideTooltip);
                filterBtn2.addEventListener('click', hideTooltip);
            }

            const experiencesFilterBtn2 = document.getElementById('experiencesFilterBtn2');
            if (experiencesFilterBtn2) {
                experiencesFilterBtn2.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => showTooltip(experiencesFilterBtn2, 'Filter by'));
                experiencesFilterBtn2.addEventListener('mouseleave', hideTooltip);
                experiencesFilterBtn2.addEventListener('click', hideTooltip);
            }

            // Preview toggle switch tooltips (desktop)
            const previewToggleSwitch = document.querySelector('#previewToggle .preview-toggle-switch');
            if (previewToggleSwitch) {
                previewToggleSwitch.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => showTooltip(previewToggleSwitch, 'Preview mode'));
                previewToggleSwitch.addEventListener('mouseleave', hideTooltip);
                previewToggleSwitch.addEventListener('click', hideTooltip);
            }

            // Preview toggle switch tooltips (mobile)
            const mobilePreviewToggleSwitch = document.querySelector('#mobilePreviewToggle .preview-toggle-switch');
            if (mobilePreviewToggleSwitch) {
                mobilePreviewToggleSwitch.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => showTooltip(mobilePreviewToggleSwitch, 'Preview mode'));
                mobilePreviewToggleSwitch.addEventListener('mouseleave', hideTooltip);
                mobilePreviewToggleSwitch.addEventListener('click', hideTooltip);
            }
        }

        // ==========================================
        // PUBLIC API - Only 2 global functions
        // ==========================================

        /**
         * Initialize component with data OR receive updates from host
         */
        window.myop_init_interface = function (data) {
            if (arguments.length > 0) {
                console.log('Component: myop_init_interface() called with:', data);

                // Handle user data
                if (data.user !== undefined) {
                    state.user = {...state.user, ...data.user};
                }

                // Handle stats
                if (data.stats !== undefined) {
                    state.stats = {...state.stats, ...data.stats};
                }

                // Handle components data
                let previewComponentToShow = null;
                let skipComponentRender = false;
                let componentsWithNewPreview = [];
                if (data.components !== undefined) {
                    const oldComponents = state.components;
                    state.components = data.components || [];

                    // Pre-populate requestedPreviews for components that already have previewHtml
                    // This prevents re-requesting previews that are already cached
                    state.components.forEach(comp => {
                        if (comp.previewHtml) {
                            requestedPreviews.add(comp.id);
                        }
                    });

                    // Check if this is a preview-only update (same components, just previewHtml added)
                    const onlyPreviewChanged = oldComponents.length === state.components.length &&
                        oldComponents.every((old, idx) => {
                            const curr = state.components[idx];
                            return old.id === curr.id &&
                                old.name === curr.name &&
                                old.author === curr.author &&
                                old.lastEdited === curr.lastEdited;
                        });

                    // Find all components that received new preview data
                    state.components.forEach(newComp => {
                        const oldComp = oldComponents.find(c => c.id === newComp.id);
                        if (newComp.previewHtml && (!oldComp || !oldComp.previewHtml)) {
                            componentsWithNewPreview.push(newComp);
                        }
                    });

                    // Skip re-render if only preview data changed (either in hover mode or preview mode)
                    if (onlyPreviewChanged && componentsWithNewPreview.length > 0) {
                        skipComponentRender = true;
                        // For hover mode, track which one to show
                        if (currentPreviewComponentId && currentPreviewCard) {
                            const newComponent = componentsWithNewPreview.find(c => c.id === currentPreviewComponentId);
                            if (newComponent) {
                                previewComponentToShow = newComponent;
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }

                // Handle experiences data
                if (data.experiences !== undefined) {
                    state.experiences = data.experiences || [];
                }

                // Handle configuration
                if (data.config !== undefined) {
                    if (data.config.showBanner !== undefined) {
                        state.showBanner = data.config.showBanner;
                    }
                    // Handle preview mode initial value
                    if (data.config.previewMode !== undefined) {
                        const newPreviewMode = !!data.config.previewMode;
                        if (newPreviewMode !== previewModeEnabled) {
                            previewModeEnabled = newPreviewMode;
                            const previewToggle = document.getElementById('previewToggle');
                            if (previewToggle) {
                                previewToggle.classList.toggle('active', previewModeEnabled);
                            }
                            const mobilePreviewToggle = document.getElementById('mobilePreviewToggle');
                            if (mobilePreviewToggle) {
                                mobilePreviewToggle.classList.toggle('active', previewModeEnabled);
                            }
                            if (previewModeEnabled) {
                                setupPreviewObserver();
                            } else {
                                cleanupPreviewObserver();
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }

                // Handle isPersonalOrg
                if (data.isPersonalOrg !== undefined) {
                    state.isPersonalOrg = data.isPersonalOrg;
                }

                // Handle action-based updates
                if (data.action) {
                    switch (data.action) {
                        case 'toggleBanner':
                            state.showBanner = !state.showBanner;
                            break;
                        case 'showBanner':
                            state.showBanner = true;
                            break;
                        case 'hideBanner':
                            state.showBanner = false;
                            break;
                        case 'setData':
                            if (data.payload) {
                                if (data.payload.components) state.components = data.payload.components;
                                if (data.payload.experiences) state.experiences = data.payload.experiences;
                            }
                            break;
                        default:
                            console.warn('Component: Unknown action:', data.action);
                    }
                }

                // Skip full re-render if only preview data changed
                if (!skipComponentRender) {
                    updateView();
                }

                // Load preview into existing cards if we have preview HTML
                if (previewComponentToShow && currentPreviewCard) {
                    // Hover mode - update the hovered card
                    showComponentPreview(previewComponentToShow, currentPreviewCard);
                } else if (previewModeEnabled && componentsWithNewPreview.length > 0) {
                    // Preview mode - update all cards in viewport that received new preview data
                    componentsWithNewPreview.forEach(comp => {
                        // Update desktop cards
                        const card = document.querySelector(`.component-card[data-id="${comp.id}"]`);
                        if (card) {
                            // Check if card is in viewport
                            const rect = card.getBoundingClientRect();
                            const isInViewport = rect.top < window.innerHeight && rect.bottom > 0;
                            if (isInViewport) {
                                showComponentPreview(comp, card);
                            }
                        }
                        // Update mobile cards
                        const mobilePreviewArea = document.querySelector(`.mobile-preview-area[data-component-id="${comp.id}"]`);
                        if (mobilePreviewArea && comp.previewHtml) {
                            const centeredHtml = injectPreviewCenteringStyles(comp.previewHtml);
                            mobilePreviewArea.innerHTML = `<iframe srcdoc="${centeredHtml.replace(/"/g, '"')}" sandbox="allow-scripts allow-same-origin"></iframe>`;
                        }
                    });
                } else if (previewModeEnabled && !skipComponentRender) {
                    // Initial load with preview mode on - show all cached previews immediately
                    state.components.forEach(comp => {
                        if (comp.previewHtml) {
                            // Update desktop cards
                            const card = document.querySelector(`.component-card[data-id="${comp.id}"]`);
                            if (card) {
                                showComponentPreview(comp, card);
                            }
                            // Update mobile cards
                            const mobilePreviewArea = document.querySelector(`.mobile-preview-area[data-component-id="${comp.id}"]`);
                            if (mobilePreviewArea) {
                                const centeredHtml = injectPreviewCenteringStyles(comp.previewHtml);
                                mobilePreviewArea.innerHTML = `<iframe srcdoc="${centeredHtml.replace(/"/g, '"')}" sandbox="allow-scripts allow-same-origin"></iframe>`;
                            }
                        }
                    });
                }

                return data;
            }

            // Getter - return current state
            return {
                user: state.user,
                stats: state.stats,
                components: state.components,
                experiences: state.experiences,
                config: {showBanner: state.showBanner, previewMode: previewModeEnabled}
            };
        };

        /**
         * Handle CTA events from component to host
         * This function will be overridden by the host application
         * @param {string} action_id - Action identifier
         * @param {Object} payload - Event payload
         */
        window.myop_cta_handler = function (action_id, payload) {
            // Default implementation - will be replaced by host
            console.log('Component: myop_cta_handler called (no host handler):', action_id, payload);
        };

        // ==========================================
        // AUTO-INITIALIZE
        // ==========================================

        if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
            document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', initializeEventListeners);
        } else {
            initializeEventListeners();
        }

        console.log('Component loaded and ready for initialization');

    })(); // End IIFE
</script>
